title: Over half a million power tool batteries have been recalled due to a USB-C charging fire risk

body:
A quick roundup of a trending story from the tech world: “Over half a million power tool batteries have been recalled due to a USB-C charging fire risk.” Full story, images, and details are available at the original source below.

Read the full article at The Verge →

Source: The Verge. This is a curated summary; full credit and content belong to the original publisher.
